## Checklist

- [ ] No generated binaries, credentials, personal identities, or local paths were added.
- [ ] Source pins, metadata, manifests, and docs agree.
- [ ] The change makes no unsupported certification or compliance claim.
- [ ] Commits are signed and use Conventional Commits.
